items.title: Flow-based Phase-space Tomography of Continuous-variable Quantum States
items.hook: QST-Flow uses generative neural network flows to reconstruct continuous quantum states directly from experimental data.

items.title: Complexity transition in the Dicke model of light-matter interaction
items.hook: Sharp dynamical phase transitions in Krylov complexity are uncovered in the light-matter Dicke model.

items.title: A geometric framework for spin relaxation
items.hook: Experiments on diamond NV centers reframe spin relaxation as directional transport governed by a unified tensor.

items.title: Fault-tolerant quantum algorithms for simulating atomic nuclei
items.hook: Quantum simulations of 32Mg and 219At nuclei require gate counts comparable to standard chemistry benchmarks like Femoco.

items.title: Enhancing Entanglement Purification with Shared Randomness
items.hook: Shuffling stored quantum states with shared randomness boosts entanglement purification success without custom circuit tuning.

items.title: Strategic Plan for Neutral Atom Quantum Computation
items.hook: A new roadmap outlines how neutral-atom quantum processors can achieve practical quantum advantage through hardware and networking.

items.title: Fermionic pairs, from the surface to the bulk
items.hook: Single-atom imaging reveals how fermion pairs shift from low-density surfaces to the bulk as system sizes grow.

items.title: Efficiently Simulable Pauli Correlation Encoding
items.hook: Classically simulable quantum encodings deliver high-quality solutions for optimization across thousands of variables.

items.title: Qoreo: Choreographic Programming for Quantum Distributed Systems
items.hook: Qoreo lets programmers write global quantum protocols that project into guaranteed deadlock-free node networks.

items.title: Arnold--Nielsen Geometry for Complexity-Deformed Noncommutative Transport
items.hook: Deforming quantum transport geometry with complexity operators enables exact paths for preparing Bell states.

items.title: Statevector-Referenced Geometry Survival of a Four-Qubit ZZ Quantum Kernel on IBM Quantum Hardware: A Fixed-Subset Diagnostic Across Three Execution Configurations
items.hook: Gate twirling preserved quantum kernel geometry up to 0.989 CKA, yet task relevance remained no better than random chance.

items.title: Collective Electronic Entanglement via Infrared Cavity-Induced Vibronic Transduction
items.hook: Infrared cavity coupling bypassed the standard 1/N dilution limit, enabling scale-invariant O(1) molecular entanglement.

items.title: Quantum Synchronization
items.hook: This review surveys quantum synchronization, revealing how quantum systems adjust their rhythms for novel tech.

items.title: Dark matter searches with a 13 meV threshold superconducting sensor array
items.hook: QUALIPHIDE set world-record dark matter constraints using a sensor array with a tiny 13 meV energy threshold.

items.title: SoK: Adversarial Robustness of the Variational Quantum Eigensolver via Red-Teaming
items.hook: Manipulating quantum error mitigation can amplify cloud quantum computing errors up to 8.84x in cyberattacks.

items.title: Perfect state transfer in Grover walks on normal Cayley graphs
items.hook: Mathematicians proved that exactly four unitary Cayley graphs support perfect state transfer in Grover walks.

items.title: A general estimation framework for continuous-variable systems
items.hook: Informational completeness isn't enough: quantum state reconstruction can fail without frame bounds.

items.title: Steady States of a Single Trapped-Ion Spin Coupled to an Engineered Non-Markovian Bath
items.hook: A single qubit coupled to a memory-retaining bath reaches steady states impossible under Markovian dissipation.

items.title: Non-Abelian Gauge Field Mechanics
items.hook: Researchers built a non-Abelian gauge field in a mechanical lattice of oscillators, steering wave localization.

items.title: QuantiSpect: A Structure-Aware Lightweight 3D CNN Pre-Decoder for Scalable Surface Code Quantum Error Correction
items.hook: QuantiSpect decodes quantum errors with up to 2.84x fewer operations and 2.71x fewer parameters.

items.title: Hardware Robustness of Sample-Based Quantum Diagonalization
items.hook: A quantum particle hopping on a chiral Cayley tree reveals a bizarre 'semi-fractal' state of matter.

items.title: Semi-fractality and localization on a chiral Cayley tree
items.hook: Quantum particles on a chiral Cayley tree display semi-fractality and tunable wave-function localization.

items.title: Phase-Sensitive Benchmarking of Composite Quantum Gates with Chiral-Interference Circuits on Quantum Hardware
items.hook: Composite quantum gates H5s and X5 maintain high target populations even under massive 50% relative errors.

items.title: CutBackdoor: A Circuit Cut Triggered Backdoor Attack on Variational Quantum Algorithms
items.hook: CutBackdoor is the first backdoor attack triggering a 1.3x to 2.9x energy error when quantum circuits are cut.

items.title: Fast logical operations in quantum LDPC codes using simple resource states
items.hook: A new quantum LDPC protocol speeds up random Clifford circuits by up to 74x using simple cat states.

items.title: Radiopurity material assays and radiation exposure projections for superconducting qubit measurements at SNOLAB
items.hook: Buried under 2 km of rock, scientists are mapping radiation to protect superconducting qubits from cosmic interference.

items.title: Reverse engineering of single-qubit quantum gates
items.hook: Researchers have solved the reverse-engineering equation to design any single-qubit gate using a simple modulated wave.

items.title: Quantum-classical crossover in fault-tolerant quantum dynamics simulation
items.hook: At a 10^-3 error rate, a 100-site quantum simulation takes 2 hours—while classical supercomputers would take 100 years.

items.title: Parameterized Quantum Circuit Semantics Through Enriched Categories
items.hook: Enriched category theory provides a new mathematical framework to model parameterized quantum ansatz circuits.

items.title: Combinatorial aspects of holographic quantum secret sharing
items.hook: A new combinatorial model of holographic quantum secret sharing reveals multiple phase transitions in AdS3/CFT2.

items.title: Locality of deep thermalisation through the lens of entanglement teleportation
items.hook: In generic quantum systems, deep thermalisation timescales scale logarithmically with distance.

items.title: Dynamic Entanglement Distribution for Multi-User and Multi-Protocol Quantum Networking
items.hook: Researchers demonstrated a stable six-user quantum network operating continuously for over 150 hours.

items.title: Coulomb blockade in microscopic material defects as a source of decoherence and noise in solid-state quantum circuits
items.hook: A newly discovered defect in metallic grains is just as damaging to quantum circuits as two-level systems.

items.title: Counterexamples to additivity of minimum output $p$-Rényi entropy of quantum channels for $p>3/4$ and $0\leq p<1/4$
items.hook: Additivity of minimum output Rényi entropy fails for the intervals p > 3/4 and 0 ≤ p < 1/4.

items.title: Entanglement Detection for Two-Qubit and Three-Qubit Pure States via Unitary Transformations and Ancilla State Measurements
items.hook: New quantum circuits measure 2-qubit and 3-qubit entanglement directly, skipping slow state tomography.

items.title: Backpropagating Pauli Propagation
items.hook: A new backpropagation algorithm slashes the memory cost of optimizing quantum circuits by a factor of O(n_param).

items.title: Driven-dissipative superconductivity in moiré heterostructure without attraction
items.hook: Physicists propose a way to trigger superconductivity using optical driving and dissipation instead of attraction.

items.title: Parameter-Shift Rules for Gradients in Boson Sampling Experiments
items.hook: New parameter-shift rules unlock exact gradient calculations for lossy boson sampling experiments.

items.title: LDGM-Based Quantum Codes for Fault-Tolerant Quantum Computation
items.hook: A new family of CSS quantum codes limits stabilizer weights to enable highly practical fault-tolerant computing.

items.title: Fast two-dimensional tensor-network contraction via subspace iteration
items.hook: Subspace-iteration CTMRG delivers up to 100x speedups for 2D tensor-network contractions on GPUs.

items.title: Superadditivity for Entanglement-Assisted Communication
items.hook: Correlations across quantum channel uses can boost communication reliability even when capacity remains additive.

items.title: Periodic orbits and quantum many-body scars in integrable spin chains
items.hook: Researchers have mapped quantum many-body scars directly to periodic orbits in integrable spin chains.

items.title: On the origin of finite entanglement scaling
items.hook: A new sparse solver reveals that tensor network approximations of critical systems differ from CFT predictions.

items.title: Quantum Lock-In Detection via Successive Adiabatic Evolution
items.hook: A new quantum lock-in detection protocol uses adiabatic evolution to completely eliminate spectral leakage.

items.title: A magnetic monopole in a superfluid bubble
items.hook: Vortices in a spherical superfluid shell behave exactly like electric charges orbiting a magnetic monopole.

items.title: Pair-Partition Constructions for CPM-Based Quantum LDPC Codes
items.hook: New quantum LDPC codes achieve a distance of 16 with rates up to 0.440 using circulant permutation matrices.

items.title: Sail membranes for optomechanical accelerometry
items.hook: A new sail-like trampoline resonator achieves a room temperature thermal noise of just 40 n_g0/rt-Hz.

items.title: Benchmarking trigonometric continuous-variable gate primitives with trapped ions
items.hook: Trigonometric continuous-variable gates have been experimentally benchmarked on a trapped-ion quantum platform.

items.title: Cluster-configurational study of G-center in Silicon
items.hook: Quantum chemistry methods achieve excellent agreement with experimental spin and optical properties of G-centers in Silicon.

items.title: Building Shor's Algorithm in Lean: An Agentic Formalization of Quantum Attacks on RSA-2048 and P-256
items.hook: AI agents have successfully formalized Shor's quantum attacks on RSA-2048 and P-256 cryptography in Lean.

items.title: Reshaping quantum annealing landscapes with diagonal catalysts
items.hook: New ZZ-catalysts reshape quantum annealing landscapes to prevent solvers from getting trapped in wrong answers.

items.title: High-fidelity entanglement of polar molecules by dynamic geometric control
items.hook: Physicists achieve a 0.976 Bell state entanglement fidelity in laser-cooled molecules by beating thermal jitter.

items.title: The Infraparticle Edge
items.hook: A new mathematical derivation unifies the quantum dephasing of charged particles with the 'unparticle' spectral edge.

items.title: Spin Chain Quantum Communication on a Trapped-Ion Processor
items.hook: Engineered spin chains on IonQ's trapped-ion hardware significantly boost quantum communication fidelity.

items.title: Expressibility and trainability of a two-dimensional pairwise quantum-circuit ansatz
items.hook: A native 2D quantum circuit design outperforms traditional 1D chains in expressibility at shallow depths.

items.title: Fixed-Boost Wigner Noise: Strict Trace-Distance Contraction without Quantum Degradability
items.hook: Physicists prove that ordering spin distinguishability does not determine quantum statistical post-processing order.

items.title: A Noise-Aware Quantum Algorithm for Credit Valuation Adjustments on Real Quantum Hardware
items.hook: A new noise-aware quantum algorithm makes financial risk calculations on real quantum hardware faster and more accurate.

items.title: An efficient algorithm for approximate shadow Hamiltonian simulation
items.hook: A new shadow Hamiltonian simulation algorithm slashes the qubit register size needed to model quantum dynamics.

items.title: Paraparticles intrinsically exhibit Hardy-space breakdown
items.hook: Paraparticles intrinsically break Hardy-space analyticity, exposing a hidden 0.51 metric distortion.

items.title: Noise Resilience of Quantum Key Distribution Protocols Secured Against Independent Attacks With One-Way Communication
items.hook: The six-state QKD protocol beats BB84, B92, and E91 in noise resistance and post-selection efficiency.

items.title: Trotter error compensation with polylogarithmic precision and nested-commutator scaling without ancillas
items.hook: A new quantum simulation algorithm achieves polylogarithmic precision without needing any extra ancillary qubits.

items.title: Bounding Kirkwood-Dirac negativity of Gaussian processes
items.hook: Gaussian states are mathematically proven to be sufficient for reaching extreme values of quantum nonclassicality.

items.title: Optimal tomography of bosonic and fermionic Gaussian states
items.hook: The sample complexity of learning bosonic and fermionic Gaussian states scales quadratically with the number of modes.

items.title: Robust nuclear hyperpolarization of small molecules through intermolecular transfer of parahydrogen-derived polarization
items.hook: A new NMR technique amplifies signals 300-fold on a benchtop spectrometer, detecting PFAS in under a minute.

items.title: Phase-switchable nonreciprocal entanglement via magnon squeezing in ring-cavity optomagnomechanics
items.hook: A new ring-cavity setup uses magnon squeezing to switch quantum entanglement on and off with a simple phase shift.

items.title: Nonlinear particle detectors across the Rindler firewall
items.hook: Standard sharp firewall models break down when particle detectors use realistic, nonlinear quantum couplings.

items.title: Silicon-Germanium Heterostructures with Enhanced Valley Splitting for Spin Qubits
items.hook: A novel Si/SiGe heterostructure design boosts valley splitting to 1-5 meV, potentially solving a major qubit scaling issue.

items.title: Local Determinacy of Quantum Master Equations and a Mechanical Interpretation of the Multi-Mode Jaynes-Cummings and Central Spin Models
items.hook: Non-Markovian quantum systems can be modeled using only their current local state, bypassing complex history tracking.

items.title: Optimality of the free quantum evolution: the general case with nodes
items.hook: Nodes in a free quantum wave function act as local minima, suggesting they are intrinsically unstable.

items.title: A Quantum Path to Partial Differential Equations
items.hook: Bridge the gap between numerical analysis and quantum computing to solve complex differential equations.

items.title: Plaquette: A hardware-aware design platform for fault-tolerant quantum computers
items.hook: Plaquette simulates quantum computer errors directly from hardware physics, outperforming standard Pauli models.

items.title: Typicality of Steering for Two-qubit States
items.hook: Quantum steering reaches 100% typicality for random two-qubit states as the number of measurements increases.

items.title: Irreducible Geometry of Higher-Order Correlator Families
items.hook: A new geometric framework maps complex quantum simulator data into operator space to isolate truly new information.

items.title: Hockey stick $f$-divergences
items.hook: A unified mathematical framework connects quantum hockey stick divergences to error probabilities and channel reversibility.

items.title: Approaching Carnot Efficiency at Finite Power in an Experimentally Feasible Quantum Heat Engine
items.hook: A new superconducting-circuit design bypasses classical limits to approach perfect Carnot efficiency at finite power.

items.title: Competing Chern states revealed by quasiparticle charging in moiré rhombohedral graphene
items.hook: A thermodynamic phase transition in moiré graphene occurs below 150 mK, ruling out edge-state theories.

items.title: Robust One-Sided Device-Independent Quantum Key Distribution via High-Dimensional Steering
items.hook: Using 11-dimensional photon entanglement, researchers achieved secure quantum key distribution robust against noise and loss.

items.title: Absence of quantum advantage for approximate spin glass optimization
items.hook: Semiclassical models match or beat quantum algorithms at solving complex spin glass optimization problems.

items.title: Quantum-Geometric Design of Lattice Generalized Landau Levels
items.hook: New lattice models with custom quantum geometry host exotic states like Moore-Read and fractional Chern insulators.

items.title: Quantifying randomness with measurement incompatibility
items.hook: Quantum measurement incompatibility can be used to mathematically guarantee and certify true randomness.

items.title: Low-latency FPGA-based electronic control system for fast preparation of defect-free atom arrays
items.hook: A new FPGA control system cuts feedback latency to 282 μs, boosting atom array assembly success to 95.4%.

items.title: Instability of the undecidable behavior of the spectral gap in 1D
items.hook: The famous proof that 1D quantum spectral gaps are undecidable is highly unstable, becoming decidable under tiny perturbations.

items.title: Entanglement Wedge Reconstruction without Holographic Quantum Error Correction
items.hook: Holographic quantum error correction might not exist in ordinary, finite-N quantum gravity systems.

items.title: Microwave Studies of Single Crystal TeO2 at Cryogenic Temperatures
items.hook: Single-crystal TeO2 cooled to 20 mK achieves an ultra-low microwave loss tangent approaching 3e-8.

items.title: Temperature Beyond Equilibrium in Isolated Quantum Many-Body Systems and Their Subsystems
items.hook: A new thermodynamic framework redefines 'temperature' for isolated quantum systems far from equilibrium.

items.title: Extracting conformal data from Loschmidt echoes after critical quenches
items.hook: Extract critical quantum exponents and central charges directly from real-time dynamics without cooling systems.

items.title: Symmetry as a route to generalized bosonic Kitaev chains
items.hook: A hidden effective time-reversal symmetry is mathematically guaranteed in any chiral quadratic bosonic pairing system.

items.title: A Novel Hadronic Calorimeter With A Direct Neutron Readout
items.hook: A new gadolinium-loaded calorimeter improves hadronic energy resolution from 21.8% to 13.3% by capturing neutrons.

items.title: Agentic SABRE: An Uncertainty-Aware Neuro-Symbolic Multi-Agent Framework for Adaptive Ransomware Detection
items.hook: Agentic SABRE achieves a perfect 1.0 AUC on semantic ransomware datasets while slashing false escalations by 4.9%.

items.title: Noise Suppression via Pulsed All-Optical Magnetometry with Nitrogen-Vacancy Ensembles
items.hook: A new pulsed all-optical diamond sensor protocol achieves a 10x lower noise floor without microwave hardware.

items.title: A global predicted-fMRI drive signal from TRIBE does not predict YouTube replay heatmaps
items.hook: A top brain-encoding AI model fails to predict which parts of YouTube videos people actually re-watch.

items.title: Matrix Approximation of Bachelier Option Prices and Greeks under Stochastic Volatility models
items.hook: A new matrix method calculates option prices and Greeks for infinite strikes using only finite expectations.

items.title: Multi-scale reconstruction of single-ion damage tracks in diamond via nitrogen-vacancy centers
items.hook: Machine learning and diamond quantum defects can reconstruct the collision tracks of sub-MeV carbon ions.

items.title: Graph Reinforcement Learning for Calibration-Aware Quantum Circuit Routing
items.hook: Graph RL quantum routing using daily calibration data achieves 0.727 fidelity, outperforming SABRE baselines by ~0.28.

items.title: Parahydrogen Cooling of Nuclear Spin Chains at Hypogeomagnetic Fields
items.hook: Researchers cooled nuclear spins in a 12-spin chain down to 52 mK using parahydrogen at ultra-low magnetic fields.

items.title: Hardware-aware Low-latency Quantum Compilation with Data-driven Lightweight Error Detection for Early Fault-Tolerant Systems
items.hook: A new quantum compiler boosts algorithmic success rates by up to 68% using lightweight error detection.

items.title: A nanoscale magnetic spectrum analyzer based on qubit dressed states
items.hook: A new quantum 'dressing' technique lets diamond sensors analyze high-frequency magnetic signals at the nanoscale.

items.title: Demonstrating magnetic memory in iron-rhodium structures using a quantum diamond microscope
items.hook: Quantum diamond microscopes have successfully demonstrated robust magnetic memory in iron-rhodium structures.

items.title: Topological Edge States from Molecular Chirality: A General Framework for Dimerized Dipolar Arrays
items.hook: Molecular chirality can naturally create topological edge states where opposite edges host opposite handedness.

items.title: dSABRE: A SABRE-Style Router for Multi-Core Distributed Quantum Computers
items.hook: New dSABRE router slashes quantum teleportation costs by up to 68% in multi-core quantum computers.

items.title: Fidelity-Aware Frequency Allocation and Transpilation Co-Design for Tunable Coupler Quantum Systems
items.hook: A new quantum co-design framework slashes error rates by 8.9% and circuit depth by 6.8% on SNAIL architectures.

items.title: Drive-Only Interaction Engineering via Dynamical Freezing
items.hook: Dynamically freezing a helper qubit lets researchers switch quantum interactions on and off using only drive signals.
